== Notes for [[Item:Q111484|Q111484]] ==

=Munia Froilaz=

* c. 0730

==Genitori==

>Padre: Fruela, Duque de Cantabria * 0700

>Madre: N

==Matrimoni==

c.
Froila I, rey de León * c. 0725

==Figli==

* Alfonso II el Casto, rey de León * 0759
* Froila de Leon * c. 0760 N
* Ximena de Asturias
* Diego Frolaz, Conde de Castilla

''in: GeneAll.it <http://www.geneall.net/I/per_page.php?id=8173>''

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
